_comment: Tian Shui Spirit Fox (天水灵狐) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 3/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.
name: Tian Shui Spirit Fox

canonical.appearance: Fox spirit that inhabits Tian Shui City. Mischievous but harmless to mortals.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
